scripts.clean:all: rm -rf node_modules tooling/satsuma-cli/node_modules tooling/satsuma-core/node_modules tooling/satsuma-viz-model/node_modules tooling/satsuma-viz-backend/node_modules tooling/tree-sitter-satsuma/node_modules tooling/satsuma-viz/node_modules tooling/satsuma-viz-harness/node_modules tooling/satsuma-lsp/node_modules tooling/vscode-satsuma/node_modules tooling/satsuma-core/dist tooling/satsuma-viz-model/dist tooling/satsuma-viz-backend/dist tooling/satsuma-cli/dist tooling/satsuma-cli/src/generated tooling/satsuma-viz/dist tooling/satsuma-viz-harness/dist tooling/satsuma-lsp/dist tooling/vscode-satsuma/dist tooling/tree-sitter-satsuma/build tooling/tree-sitter-satsuma/tree-sitter-satsuma.wasm
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-core install && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz-model install && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz-backend install && npm --prefix tooling/tree-sitter-satsuma install && cd tooling/tree-sitter-satsuma && tree-sitter build --wasm . -o tree-sitter-satsuma.wasm && cd ../.. && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-cli install && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz install && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz run build && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz-harness install && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-lsp install && npm --prefix tooling/vscode-satsuma install && npm --prefix tooling/vscode-satsuma run build:server
scripts.ci:all: npm ci && npm ci --prefix tooling/satsuma-core && npm ci --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz-model && npm ci --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz-backend && npm ci --prefix tooling/tree-sitter-satsuma && npm ci --ignore-scripts --prefix tooling/satsuma-cli && npm ci --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz && npm ci --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz-harness && npm ci --prefix tooling/satsuma-lsp && npm ci --prefix tooling/vscode-satsuma
scripts.reinstall: npm run clean:all && npm run install:all
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:md && npm run lint:yaml && npm run lint:python
scripts.lint:python: ruff check scripts/ tooling/tree-sitter-satsuma/scripts/ skills/ smoke-tests/
scripts.test:coverage: npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-core run test:coverage && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz-model run test:coverage && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz-backend run test:coverage && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-viz run test:coverage && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-lsp run test:coverage && npm --prefix tooling/satsuma-cli run test:coverage
